var(--slate-600);\n}\n\nbody {\n    font-family: \"Proxima Nova\", \"Inter\", system-ui, sans-serif;\n    background-color: var(--surface-muted);\n    color: var(--text);\n    padding: 20px;\n    min-height: 100vh;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.container {\n    max-width: 960px;\n    width: 100%;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.step {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.step.active {\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* Landing Page Styles */\n.landing-content {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n}\n\n.landing-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.landing-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 52, 77, 0.35), rgba(0, 52, 77, 0.55));\n    padding: 40px;\n}\n\n.landing-title {\n    color: #fff;\n    font-size: 2.5rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);\n    line-height: 1.2;\n}\n\n.start-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 16px 48px;\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.25);\n}\n\n.start-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.35);\n}\n\n.start-button:active {\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n.option:hover {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.16);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n}\n\n.question-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 15px;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 10px;\n    background-color: var(--slate-200);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n var(--slate-600);\n}\n\nbody {\n    font-family: \"Proxima Nova\", \"Inter\", system-ui, sans-serif;\n    background-color: var(--surface-muted);\n    color: var(--text);\n    padding: 20px;\n    min-height: 100vh;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.container {\n    max-width: 960px;\n    width: 100%;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.step {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.step.active {\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* Landing Page Styles */\n.landing-content {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n}\n\n.landing-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.landing-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 52, 77, 0.35), rgba(0, 52, 77, 0.55));\n    padding: 40px;\n}\n\n.landing-title {\n    color: #fff;\n    font-size: 2.5rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45);\n    line-height: 1.2;\n}\n\n.start-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 16px 48px;\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.25);\n}\n\n.start-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.35);\n}\n\n.start-button:active {\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n.option:hover {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.16);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    order: 1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    order: 0;\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n}\n\n.question-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 15px;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 10px;\n    background-color: var(--slate-200);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: flex-start;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n margin-bottom: 12px;\n    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: #fff;\n    font-size: 1.15rem;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.restart-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-top: auto;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.restart-button:hover min-height: 100vh;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.container {\n    max-width: 960px;\n    width: 100%;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.step {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.step.active {\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* Landing Page Styles */\n.landing-content {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: 0.35);\n}\n\n.start-button:active {\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n transform: scale(1.05);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    order: 1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    order: 0;\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    min-height: 64px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0,    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 10px;\n    background-color: var(--slate-200);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px 0.5);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: #fff;\n    font-size: 1.15rem;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.restart-button min-height: 100vh;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.container {\n    max-width: 960px;\n    width: 100%;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.step {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.step.active {\n    display: block;\n}\n\n/* Landing Page Styles */\n.landing-content {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n}\n\n.landing-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.landing-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28));\n    padding: 40px;\n}\n\n.landing-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.5rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);\n    line-height: 1.2;\n    max-width: 720px;\n}\n\n.start-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 16px 48px;\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.25);\n}\n\n.start-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.35);\n}\n\n.start-button:active {\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n.option:hover {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.16);\n}\n\n.option:hover img {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    order: 1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    order: 0;\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    min-height: 64px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.question-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 15px;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 10px;\n    background-color: var(--slate-200);\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: var(--text-muted);\n    font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    padding: 48px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12));\n}\n\n.result-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 12px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 1.15rem;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.restart-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-top: auto;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.restart-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* Responsive Design */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n    .options-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n    }\n\n    .landing-title {\n        font-size: 1.8rem;\n    }\n\n    .result-title {\n        font-size: 1.5rem;\n    }\n\n    .question-title {\n        font-size: 1.2rem;\n    }\n\n    .landing-overlay,\n    .result-overlay {\n        padding: 20px;\n    }\n}\n\n"

{\n        step.classList.remove('active');\n    });\n    \n    // Show the requested step\n    const step = document.getElementById(stepId);\n    if (step) {\n        step.classList.add('active');\n\n        // Move the progress section inside the current question container\n        const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n        const questionContainer = step.querySelector('.question-container');\n        if (progressSection &amp;&amp; questionContainer) {\n            questionContainer.appendChild(progressSection);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateProgressForStep(stepId);\n}\n\n// Handle option selection\nfunction selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {\n    // Remove previous selection for this question\n    const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;\n    const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);\n    const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    options.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Mark selected option\n    const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;\n    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');\n    \n    // Store answer\n    answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;\n    \n    // Enable next button\n    const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);\n    if (nextButton) {\n        nextButton.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\n// Update global progress bar based on current step\nfunction updateProgressForStep(stepId) {\n    let percentage = 0;\n\n    const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n\n    if (stepId === 'question-1') {\n        percentage = 0;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-2') {\n        percentage = 25;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-3') {\n        percentage = 50;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-4') {\n        percentage = 75;\n    } else if (stepId === 'result') {\n        percentage = 100;\n    }\n\n    // Hide progress on landing and result pages\n    if (progressSection) {\n        if (stepId === 'landing' || stepId === 'result') {\n            progressSection.classList.add('hidden');\n        } else {\n            progressSection.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    setProgress(percentage);\n}\n\nfunction setProgress(percentage) {\n    const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n    const progressText = document.getElementById('global-progress-text');\n\n    if (progressFill) {\n        progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n\n    if (progressText) {\n        progressText.textContent = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n}\n\n// Move to next question\nfunction nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {\n    if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {\n        if (currentQuestionNum &lt; 4) {\n            showStep(&#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;);\n        } else {\n            // All questions answered: fill progress to 100% before showing result\n            setProgress(100);\n            setTimeout(() =&gt; {\n                showResult();\n            }, 300);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Calculate and show result\nfunction showResult() {\n    // Simple result calculation based on answer sum\n    // You can modify this logic to determine results differently\n    const answerSum = answers.reduce((sum, answer) =&gt; sum + answer, 0);\n    \n    // Determine result index based on answer pattern\n    // This is a simple example - you can customize the logic\n    let resultIndex;\n    if (answerSum &lt;= 6) {\n        resultIndex = 0; // Carefully Comfortable\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 10) {\n        resultIndex = 1; // Energy Champion\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 14) {\n        resultIndex = 2; // Practical Saver\n    } else {\n        resultIndex = 3; // Thoughtful Optimizer\n    }\n    \n    const result = results[resultIndex];\n    \n    // Update result page\n    const resultImage = document.getElementById('result-image');\n    const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');\n    const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');\n    \n    if (resultImage) resultImage.src = result.image;\n    if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;\n    if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;\n    \n    // Show result page\n    showStep('result');\n}\n\n// Restart the quiz\nfunction restartQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    \n    // Reset all option selections\n    const allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    allOptions.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Disable all next buttons\n    const allNextButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.next-button');\n    allNextButtons.forEach(button =&gt; {\n        button.disabled = true;\n    });\n    \n    // Start from landing page and reset progress\n    setProgress(0);\n    showStep('landing');\n}\n\n// Initialize progress bars on page load\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    updateProgressForStep('landing');\n});\n\n"

  "contentsAfterEdit": "// Store user answers\nlet answers = [];\n\n// Result data based on answer combinations\nconst results = [\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-1.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re Carefully Comfortable!',\n        description: 'You like staying cozy while keeping savings in sight.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-2.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re an Energy Champion!',\n        description: 'You\\'re committed to making smart energy choices every day.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-3.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re a Practical Saver!',\n        description: 'You focus on simple, effective ways to reduce energy use.'\n    },\n    {\n        image: 'images/result-4.jpg',\n        title: 'You\\'re a Thoughtful Optimizer!',\n        description: 'You carefully consider each energy-saving opportunity.'\n    }\n];\n\n// Initialize the quiz\nfunction startQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    showStep('question-1');\n    setProgress(0);\n}\n\n// Show a specific step\nfunction showStep(stepId) {\n    // Hide all steps\n    const steps = document.querySelectorAll('.step');\n    steps.forEach(step =&gt; {\n        step.classList.remove('active');\n    });\n    \n    // Show the requested step\n    const step = document.getElementById(stepId);\n    if (step) {\n        step.classList.add('active');\n\n        // Move the progress section inside the current question container\n        const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n        const questionContainer = step.querySelector('.question-container');\n        if (progressSection &amp;&amp; questionContainer) {\n            questionContainer.appendChild(progressSection);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateProgressForStep(stepId);\n}\n\n// Handle option selection\nfunction selectOption(questionNum, optionNum) {\n    // Remove previous selection for this question\n    const questionId = &#96;question-${questionNum}&#96;;\n    const questionContainer = document.getElementById(questionId);\n    const options = questionContainer.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    options.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Mark selected option\n    const selectedOption = event.currentTarget;\n    selectedOption.classList.add('selected');\n    \n    // Store answer\n    answers[questionNum - 1] = optionNum;\n    \n    // Enable next button\n    const nextButton = document.getElementById(&#96;next-${questionNum}&#96;);\n    if (nextButton) {\n        nextButton.disabled = false;\n    }\n}\n\n// Update global progress bar based on current step\nfunction updateProgressForStep(stepId) {\n    let percentage = 0;\n\n    const progressSection = document.querySelector('.progress-section');\n\n    if (stepId === 'question-1') {\n        percentage = 0;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-2') {\n        percentage = 25;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-3') {\n        percentage = 50;\n    } else if (stepId === 'question-4') {\n        percentage = 75;\n    } else if (stepId === 'result') {\n        percentage = 100;\n    }\n\n    // Hide progress on landing and result pages\n    if (progressSection) {\n        if (stepId === 'landing' || stepId === 'result') {\n            progressSection.classList.add('hidden');\n        } else {\n            progressSection.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    setProgress(percentage);\n}\n\nfunction setProgress(percentage) {\n    const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n    const progressText = document.getElementById('global-progress-text');\n\n    if (progressFill) {\n        progressFill.style.width = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n\n    if (progressText) {\n        progressText.textContent = &#96;${percentage}%&#96;;\n    }\n}\n\n// Animate progress to a target percentage and resolve when the bar finishes\nfunction animateProgressTo(percentage) {\n    return new Promise((resolve) =&gt; {\n        const progressFill = document.getElementById('global-progress');\n        if (!progressFill) {\n            setProgress(percentage);\n            resolve();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const onEnd = (event) =&gt; {\n            if (event.propertyName === 'width') {\n                progressFill.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n                clearTimeout(fallback);\n                resolve();\n            }\n        };\n\n        const fallback = setTimeout(() =&gt; {\n            progressFill.removeEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n            resolve();\n        }, 450);\n\n        progressFill.addEventListener('transitionend', onEnd);\n        setProgress(percentage);\n    });\n}\n\n// Move to next question\nfunction nextQuestion(currentQuestionNum) {\n    if (answers[currentQuestionNum - 1]) {\n        const isLastQuestion = currentQuestionNum &gt;= 4;\n        const nextStepId = isLastQuestion ? null : &#96;question-${currentQuestionNum + 1}&#96;;\n        const targetPercent = isLastQuestion ? 100 : currentQuestionNum * 25;\n\n        animateProgressTo(targetPercent).then(() =&gt; {\n            if (isLastQuestion) {\n                showResult();\n            } else {\n                showStep(nextStepId);\n            }\n        });\n    }\n}\n\n// Calculate and show result\nfunction showResult() {\n    // Simple result calculation based on answer sum\n    // You can modify this logic to determine results differently\n    const answerSum = answers.reduce((sum, answer) =&gt; sum + answer, 0);\n    \n    // Determine result index based on answer pattern\n    // This is a simple example - you can customize the logic\n    let resultIndex;\n    if (answerSum &lt;= 6) {\n        resultIndex = 0; // Carefully Comfortable\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 10) {\n        resultIndex = 1; // Energy Champion\n    } else if (answerSum &lt;= 14) {\n        resultIndex = 2; // Practical Saver\n    } else {\n        resultIndex = 3; // Thoughtful Optimizer\n    }\n    \n    const result = results[resultIndex];\n    \n    // Update result page\n    const resultImage = document.getElementById('result-image');\n    const resultTitle = document.getElementById('result-title');\n    const resultDescription = document.getElementById('result-description');\n    \n    if (resultImage) resultImage.src = result.image;\n    if (resultTitle) resultTitle.textContent = result.title;\n    if (resultDescription) resultDescription.textContent = result.description;\n    \n    // Show result page\n    showStep('result');\n}\n\n// Restart the quiz\nfunction restartQuiz() {\n    answers = [];\n    \n    // Reset all option selections\n    const allOptions = document.querySelectorAll('.option');\n    allOptions.forEach(option =&gt; {\n        option.classList.remove('selected');\n    });\n    \n    // Disable all next buttons\n    const allNextButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.next-button');\n    allNextButtons.forEach(button =&gt; {\n        button.disabled = true;\n    });\n    \n    // Start from landing page and reset progress\n    setProgress(0);\n    showStep('landing');\n}\n\n// Initialize progress bars on page load\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\n    updateProgressForStep('landing');\n});\n\n"
}

--primary-dark: var(--brand-700);\n    --surface: #ffffff;\n    --surface-muted: var(--slate-50);\n    --border: var(--slate-200);\n    --text: var(--slate-900);\n    --text-muted: var(--slate-600);\n}\n\nbody {\n    font-family: \"Proxima Nova\", \"Inter\", system-ui, sans-serif;\n    background-color: var(--surface-muted);\n    color: var(--text);\n    padding: 20px;\n    min-height: 100vh;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n}\n\n.container {\n    max-width: 960px;\n    width: 100%;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.step {\n    display: none;\n}\n\n.step.active {\n    display: block;\n}\n\n@keyframes fadeInUp {\n    from {\n        opacity: 0;\n        transform: translateY(12px);\n    }\n    to {\n        opacity: 1;\n        transform: translateY(0);\n    }\n}\n\n/* Landing Page Styles */\n.landing-content {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n}\n\n.landing-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.landing-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28));\n    padding: 40px;\n}\n\n.landing-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.5rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);\n    line-height: 1.2;\n    max-width: 720px;\n}\n\n.start-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 16px 48px;\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.25);\n}\n\n.start-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.35);\n}\n\n.start-button:active {\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    animation: fadeInUp 240ms ease;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n.option:hover {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.16);\n}\n\n.option:hover img {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    order: 1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    order: 0;\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    min-height: 64px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.question-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 15px;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 10px;\n    background-color: var(--slate-200);\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 18px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 8px;\n    width: 100%;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    padding: 48px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12));\n}\n\n.result-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 12px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 1.15rem;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.restart-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-top: auto;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.restart-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* Responsive Design */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n    .options-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n    }\n\n    .landing-title {\n        font-size: 1.8rem;\n    }\n\n    .result-title {\n        font-size: 1.5rem;\n    }\n\n    .question-title {\n        font-size: 1.2rem;\n    }\n\n    .landing-overlay,\n    .result-overlay {\n        padding: 20px;\n    }\n}\n\n"
